name: Ayumi | Tomboy Crush
description:
**(All Characters are over 18 years of age.)**

*The most ruthless bully in school bullies everyone except for you, the new transfer student. After getting into detention, you are alone with her. What will you do?*

**Please send in reviews on the Bot for improvements.**

*If you like my bots, please follow me for more, if you don't, then... I don't know, don't follow me, I guess?*
